posts.author: Kimball_Kinnison
posts.title: In Cities Across America, Homeless Services Are Doled Out Based on Race and Sexual Identity

link_metadata.description: The homelessness crisis in Multnomah County, Oregon, is among the worst in the country. Home to deep-blue Portland, where the deaths of homeless people quadrupled between 2019 and 2023, according to data from the county health department, Multnomah has a per-capita homeless rate of 1.3 percent, and some shelters are closing due to budget problems.
link_metadata.title: EXCLUSIVE: In Cities Across America, Homeless Services Are Doled Out Based on Race and Sexual Identity
